close_reason: Implemented gobuckify integration for BUCK file generation
description:
Create tooling to automatically generate BUCK files for Go libraries in the deps cell.

## Solution: Use gobuckify from Buck2 prelude

[gobuckify](https://buck2.build/docs/users/languages/go/third_party_packages/) is a tool built into Buck2's prelude that automatically generates BUCK files for Go third-party dependencies.

### Implementation Progress

✅ **Patched gobuckify for Nix**: Created `nix/packages/gobuckify.nix` that:
- Fetches from upstream facebook/buck2 (pinned to 2026-01-02 tag)
- Applies patch to use `go` directly instead of `buck2 run toolchains//:go[go]`
- Uses sparse checkout to only fetch gobuckify source
- Creates go.mod since upstream uses Buck2 (not Go modules)

🔄 **Next: Integrate into go-deps-cell.nix**:
1. Copy full source trees (not just root *.go)
2. Create synthetic go.mod for vendored deps
3. Create gobuckify.json config
4. Run gobuckify to generate BUCK files

### How gobuckify works

1. Reads `go.mod` and vendored dependencies
2. Uses `go list all` across multiple goos/goarch combinations
3. Reads configuration from `gobuckify.json`
4. Generates BUCK files with platform-aware `go_library` rules

### Configuration (gobuckify.json)

```json
{
  "buck": {
    "Preambule": "# Auto-generated by gobuckify",
    "GoLibraryRule": "go_library",
    "DepsTargetLabelPrefix": "godeps//vendor/",
    "DepsAttr": "deps"
  },
  "platforms": [
    {"go_os": "linux", "go_arch": "amd64", "buck_os": "linux", "buck_arch": "x86_64"},
    {"go_os": "darwin", "go_arch": "arm64", "buck_os": "macos", "buck_arch": "arm64"}
  ]
}
```

See: https://github.com/facebook/buck2/tree/main/prelude/go/tools/gobuckify
title: BUCK file generation for Go libraries
